extraction.one_line_summary: VAN DER POEL Mathieu won from a late two-up with BENOOT Tiesj after CAMPENAERTS Victor's 62-tooth chainring descent attack regrouped, outsprinting Benoot in final 250m
tactical_patterns: CAMPENAERTS Victor used 62t chainring on descent after climb 13 to solo, chipped tooth from effort, shows equipment gambles viable
INEOS riders TURNER Ben and PIDCOCK Thomas bridged early on Oudenaardeberg cobbles, creating platform that held despite subsequent attacks
BENOOT Tiesj made multiple late accelerations inside 4km forcing VAN DER POEL to chase repeatedly, inverting sprint freshness dynamics
POGAČAR Tadej closed 10s gap solo after caught out of position but stalled at that deficit, cobble inexperience showed in positioning not power

rider_signals.VAN DER POEL Mathieu: positive: nearly overcooked final corner at 250m from overpowering, suggesting peak form but marginal bike handling sharpness
rider_signals.CAMPENAERTS Victor: positive: willing to use extreme gearing (62t) and solo descent from climb 13, tactically aggressive beyond pure classics specialist role
rider_signals.BENOOT Tiesj: positive: initiated multiple accelerations inside 4km including one with CAMPENAERTS that gained gap, more aggressive than typical domestique role
rider_signals.PIDCOCK Thomas: positive: bridged to leaders early on Oudenaardeberg then survived all regroupings for podium, showing cobbled maturity beyond expectations
rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: neutral: power closed gap to 10s solo but couldn't bridge final seconds, positioning errors costly despite physical capability on cobbles debut
rider_signals.KÜNG Stefan: neutral: attacked on climb 13 but couldn't sustain, suggests time trial power insufficient without positioning advantage on cobbles
rider_signals.NAESEN Oliver: negative: crashed hard mid-race from touch of wheels, vulnerability in bunch positioning during nervous phase
rider_signals.TURNER Ben: positive: co-initiated decisive INEOS move on Oudenaardeberg with PIDCOCK, unusual aggression for domestique suggests protected status
rider_signals.VAN MOER Brent: neutral: bridged early with 90km remaining but faded from decisive selection, early effort timing misjudged
rider_signals.VAN AVERMAET Greg: negative: attempted bridge on Kanarieberg but failed while POGAČAR nearly succeeded, age showing in acceleration capacity
